name: aifs
description: AIFS — AI File System MCP Server. Exposes folder contracts as MCP resources so any AI tool can discover and read AIFS permissions natively.
author: welshDog

resources.name: All AIFS Contracts
resources.description: List every folder in the project that has an AIFS contract

resources.name: Folder Contract
resources.description: Fully resolved AIFS contract for a specific folder

resources.name: Folder Context
resources.description: Live sprint state — active task, in-flight files, approved files

resources.name: AI Changelog
resources.description: Audit log of all AI actions in a folder

tools.name: check_action
tools.description: Ask AIFS if a specific action is permitted. Returns allow/block/approval with reason.

tools.name: resolve_contract
tools.description: Get the fully resolved contract for a folder including inherited rules.

tools.name: list_locked_paths
tools.description: List all .ailock-protected paths across the project.

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Get live sprint context — active task, in-flight files, approved files.

tools.name: get_in_flight
tools.description: Get in-flight files that must not be touched right now.

prompts.name: folder_briefing
prompts.description: Full AI briefing for a folder before starting work.

prompts.name: sprint_checklist
prompts.description: Pre-edit safety checklist based on folder contract.

cursor.note: Add mcp.json path to Cursor MCP settings. AIFS contracts will auto-populate as context.

windsurf.note: Point Windsurf MCP config at this mcp.json. Cascade will read AIFS contracts before edits.
